text: Being here, I am struck by the interplay of transparency and separation—glass both connects and divides, making me aware of my own presence. Upon entering the exhibit, the bold colors and sharp typography of 'R+D' demand my attention, igniting curiosity about the purpose of this space. I feel a mild anticipation; the environment seems to invite reflection on innovation and human connection, as if asking me to contemplate my own role in the nexus of research and development. The quiet hum of technology around me is oddly reassuring, framing a moment of quiet thoughtfulness within a public space.
